{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Rutha
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Rutha]] believes she is [[Leah]]'s half-sister.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
